productDisplayName: Franco Leone Men Casual Tan Sandals
description: Cast a timeless impression in comfort with this pair of franco leone leather slippers. Give your casual wear a twist of fashion with this pair of slippers and leave behind your style statement wherever you go.UpperSoft and wide brown leather straps in a cross-over pattern for absolute style and to hold the foot in placeLeather toe separator to support the forefootFabric inner lining for the straps for absolute sweat-free comfort Leather footbed with ergonomic stitch detailing for all-day comfortOutsoleDurable rubber outsole with oval suction lugs and an impact guidance lug to offer absolute grip and cushioned comfort on various surfacesshoe careWipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dust and dirtUse a branded leather conditioner to maintain shoe shineDo not store in direct sunlight
